ddls:
CREATE TABLE "blockchain_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain node */,
  "node_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the blockchain node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the blockchain node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status check */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., full node, light node) */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain network */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software running on the node */,
  "hardware_specs" TEXT /* Hardware specifications of the node (e.g., CPU, RAM, storage) */,
  "uptime" INTEGER /* Total uptime of the node (in seconds) */,
  "last_reboot" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last reboot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blockchain_nodes_node_type FOREIGN KEY ("node_type") REFERENCES node_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blockchain_nodes_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain node where the block was mined */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number for the performance metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the block was added to the blockchain */,
  "slow_time" INTEGER /* Average confirmation time for slow transactions (in seconds) */,
  "medium_time" INTEGER /* Average confirmation time for medium transactions (in seconds) */,
  "fast_time" INTEGER /* Average confirmation time for fast transactions (in seconds) */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain network */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node where the block was mined */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Size of the block in bytes */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Gas used in the block (for Ethereum-like networks) */,
  "gas_limit" INTEGER /* Gas limit of the block */,
  "miner_address" TEXT /* Address of the miner who mined the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES blockchain_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number where the transaction is included */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "from_address" TEXT /* Address of the sender */,
  "to_address" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the transaction was included in the block */,
  "confirmation_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for the transaction to be confirmed (in seconds) */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain network */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node where the transaction was processed */,
  "gas_price" REAL /* Gas price of the transaction */,
  "nonce" INTEGER /* Nonce of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_transactions_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_block_transactions_block_number FOREIGN KEY ("block_number") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("block_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network statistic entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain node */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the statistics */,
  "total_blocks" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks mined */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions processed */,
  "average_block_time" REAL /* Average time taken to mine a block (in seconds) */,
  "average_confirmation_time" REAL /* Average confirmation time for transactions (in seconds) */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain network */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node */,
  "total_gas_used" INTEGER /* Total gas used in the network */,
  "total_gas_limit" INTEGER /* Total gas limit of the network */,
  "average_transaction_fee" REAL /* Average transaction fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_statistics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES blockchain_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_statistics_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network operator, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., metric_id, transaction_id, stat_id) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource being accessed (e.g., metric, transaction, statistic) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network incident */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain node where the incident occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., latency spike, transaction failure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain network */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node where the incident occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the incident (in seconds) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_incidents_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES blockchain_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_incidents_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_incidents_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance alert */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain node where the alert was generated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high latency, low block time) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value that exceeded the threshold */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., active, acknowledged) */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain network */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node where the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  "last_alert_time" TEXT /* Last time the alert was generated */,
  "alert_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the alert has been generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES blockchain_nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the role creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last role update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the node type (e.g., full node, light node) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node type */,
  "is_full_node" INTEGER /* Indicates if the node type is a full node */,
  "is_light_node" INTEGER /* Indicates if the node type is a light node */,
  "is_validator" INTEGER /* Indicates if the node type is a validator node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain network (e.g., Ethereum, Bitcoin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blockchain network */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the network (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the network creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last network update */,
  "block_time" REAL /* Average block time for the network (in seconds) */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Average transaction fee for the network (in native currency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)
